description_long: This object consists of three baseball bats standing upright side by side, each with a distinct color: red, yellow-green, and blue. The bats have a classic tapered cylindrical shape, with a wider barrel at the top and a narrower handle at the bottom. The handles are wrapped in a darker color, possibly to provide grip, and the ends of the handles are slightly flared. The barrels are smooth and glossy, with no visible text, logos, or markings. The end caps of the bats are rounded and colored to match the main body, with subtle color banding visible on the tops. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for recreational or professional use in urban parks or sports facilities.
description: A set of three smooth, glossy baseball bats in red, yellow-green, and blue, each with a darker grip and rounded end caps. The bats are unmarked and have a modern, clean appearance.
description_view_0: A single red baseball bat is shown from the barrel end, highlighting its smooth, tapered shape and the color-banded end cap.
description_view_1: Three baseball bats—red, yellow-green, and blue—are shown side by side from the front, displaying their full length and color contrast.
description_view_2: A single blue baseball bat is shown from the barrel end, emphasizing the rounded, color-banded end cap and the sleek finish.
description_view_3: The three bats are shown from the opposite side, with the blue bat now on the left, yellow-green in the center, and red on the right, revealing the consistent design and color distribution.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The grip area is wrapped in a solid dark color, likely synthetic, with no visible patterns, designs, or logos.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end caps are rounded and feature subtle color banding matching the main bat color, with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible logos or markings.
